title: Peruvian Nduja Anticuchos
description: Spicy Peruvian-style beef heart skewers infused with nduja for a bold twist on a classic dish.

ingredients.name: Peruvian seasoning
ingredients.notes: Or substitute with a mix of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together Peruvian seasoning, garlic, red onion, cilantro, lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
2. Add the beef heart pieces to the marinade and mix well to coat.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
4. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
5. Thread the marinated beef heart pieces onto skewers.
6. Brush the grill or grill pan with oil to prevent sticking.
7. Grill the anticuchos for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
8. While the anticuchos are cooking, heat the nduja in a small saucepan over low heat.
9. Once the anticuchos are cooked, brush them with the nduja sauce and serve hot.
